mcq:
I had finished my homework before my father _____ home.
a) comes b) came c) will come d) come

She _____ English for 2 hours before the class started.
a) studied b) was studying c) had been studying d) has been studying
tf: Past perfect is used for an action that happened before another past action. [True/False]
Past perfect continuous shows duration up to a point in the past. [True/False]
short: Change to past perfect continuous: She worked here for 5 years before she moved

mcq:
This time tomorrow, I _____ on the beach.
a) sit b) will sit c) will be sitting d) am sitting

By next year, I _____ my studies.
a) finish b) will finish c) will have finished d) finished
tf: Future continuous is used for actions in progress at a specific time in the future. [True/False]
Future perfect is used for actions completed before a point in the future. [True/False]
short: Make a sentence about what you will be doing at 8 pm tonight
Complete: By 2030, scientists _____ a cure for cancer

mcq:
The project _____ by the team next month.
a) will do b) will be done c) will have done d) is done

English _____ all over the world.
a) speaks b) is spoken c) was spoken d) has spoken
tf: We use 'be + past participle' to form the passive. [True/False]
The passive of 'She has written a letter' is 'A letter has written by her'. [True/False]
short: Change to passive: They will build a new hospital
Rewrite in active: The cake was made by my mother

mcq:
A doctor who performs operations is a:
a) dentist b) surgeon c) pharmacist d) nurse

Too much sugar can cause:
a) anemia b) diabetes c) flu d) allergy
tf: Exercise is important for good health. [True/False]
You should see a doctor only when you are very sick. [True/False]
short: Give 3 tips for a healthy lifestyle
What should you do if you have a high fever?
long: Write about how to prevent common diseases

mcq:
If I had studied harder, I _____ the exam.
a) would pass b) would have passed c) will pass d) pass

If I were you, I _____ that job.
a) would take b) would have taken c) will take d) take
tf: Type 3 conditional refers to unreal past situations. [True/False]
Mixed conditionals combine past and present. [True/False]
short: Complete: If I had known, I _____

mcq:
'Close the door,' he said. → He told me _____ the door.
a) close b) to close c) closing d) closed

'Please help me,' she said. → She asked me _____ her.
a) help b) to help c) helping d) helped
tf: In reported commands, we use 'tell + object + to + infinitive'. [True/False]
short: Report: 'Don't be late,' the teacher said
Change to reported speech: 'Can you open the window?' she asked

mcq:
My brother, _____ lives in London, is a doctor.
a) who b) which c) that d) where

The book _____ I bought yesterday is interesting.
a) who b) which c) where d) when
tf: Non-defining relative clauses give extra information and use commas. [True/False]
We can use 'that' in non-defining relative clauses. [True/False]
short: Combine: This is the man. He helped me
Add commas where needed: My teacher Mr. Ali who is very kind helped me

mcq:
Global warming is caused by an increase in:
a) Oxygen b) Carbon dioxide c) Nitrogen d) Hydrogen

Deforestation leads to:
a) More rain b) Soil erosion c) Clean air d) More forests
tf: Recycling helps reduce waste and pollution. [True/False]
Climate change has no effect on agriculture. [True/False]
short: What can individuals do to protect the environment?
long: Write an essay about the importance of protecting our planet
